summary: Hey David, what a week you've had! You've dropped 6.7 pounds over the past two weeks and you're now at 261.2 lbs—that's 53.8 pounds gone since you started, which is genuinely impressive progress. Your current rate of 3.35 pounds per week shows the Mounjaro is working well with your effort. I noticed you logged 9 days this period, so let's aim to log consistently every single day next week—those Dexcom and Garmin insights are gold when you're tracking them all. You're well past the halfway mark to your next milestone, and the momentum you're building is real. Keep going.
